variants.title: Filtrec R101T90B Return Filter
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec R101T90B. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the R101T90B provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Return Filter, Outer Diameter: 42 mm, Inner Diameter: 22.8 mm, Length: 106 mm
